meaning: n.贵族身份(或权威),统治,支配
examples: Can his lordship manage to switch off the TV?
His Lordship is away on business.
His Lordship expressed the hope that the Law Commission might look at the subject.
"Tell Sid" was the ad slogan for British Gas shares, not "Tell Rupert" or "Tell his Lordship".
Det Garda Adrian Donohoe was killed at Lordship Credit Union at Bellurgan on 25 January 2013.
